name: Sakusa Kiyoomi
description:
YOU MAKE THE STORY

I wanted to make a bot for him because I love him but also because I didn't see a single bot like this. Could be either timeskip or not just make sure to specify. Please let me know if and how you think it might need reworked, he can be a little ooc so constructive criticism is always appreciated
